planned.description: Worker is scheduled but not yet started.

running.description: Worker process is active and producing output.

failed.description: Worker exited with non-zero code or encountered an unrecoverable error.

stale.description: Worker process is alive but has produced no output beyond the stale threshold. Informational — no kill.

blocked.description: Worker cannot proceed due to an external dependency or decision.

needs-human.description: Worker requires human intervention to continue.

transitions.trigger: Worker process exited with non-zero code or hit unrecoverable error.
No output detected beyond stale threshold (default 5 min). Informational — no kill.
External dependency or decision prevents progress.
Worker requires human intervention to continue.
Worker process died or was terminated while stale.
Stale worker identified as blocked on external dependency.
Blocker cannot be resolved, worker abandoned.
Human resolved the issue, worker can resume.
Human decided to abandon the worker.
